subcodes.first_line: Thy name was mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and the gaze of His loving-kindness was directed towards thee. This day must the handmaidens of God with utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت نزد مظلوم مذکور آمد و طرف عنایت بتو متوجه الیوم باید کنیزان حق بکمال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
